flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Oklahoma City University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.4k vs 2.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma City University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
